one_liner: SPY +1.6% to $741 — broad market rebounding in holiday-shortened week; RSI 48 is neutral with EMA50 ($747) just overhead; Gareth Soloway warns of 8% further downside if 50-day EMA isn't recaptured.

price_action.intraday_story: SPY recovered from Friday's close, rallied to $741.56, and held the gains. Volume below average on a +1.6% day suggests this is index-fund rebalancing (Alphabet/Dow) and short covering rather than aggressive institutional buying.

news_catalyst.headline: Broad Tech Rally Driven by Alphabet Dow Addition, TSLA NHTSA Closure, Space Sector Momentum
news_catalyst.summary: Multiple individual stock catalysts are lifting the index today: GOOG Dow addition creating mechanical buying, TSLA NHTSA probe closure, RKLB/ASTS space sector momentum, LLY all-time high, APP AXON launch. The holiday-shortened week (Friday July 4 closure) means reduced institutional participation per Gareth Soloway's analysis. Iran-US ceasefire Sunday night removed the weekend geopolitical overhang. Market is +1.6% but below the critical 50-day EMA at $747.

technical.summary: SPY is between EMA50 ($747.76) and EMA200 ($753.82) — both overhead. RSI 48 is neutral. Soloway's key thesis: if SPY fails to recapture the daily 50-day EMA ($747) on this bounce, the 70–75% probability scenario is a 8% further decline to the ~24,000 NASDAQ equivalent. Holiday week low participation amplifies volatility in either direction.

wyckoff_narrative: No formal Wyckoff events. Soloway's 50-day EMA framework is the most relevant indicator: break below and hold below = 8% drawdown scenario; recapture and hold above = continued recovery to upper BB ($761).

valuation.summary: DCF not applicable to the S&P 500 ETF.

key_strengths: Tech/AI weighting benefits from current cycle
key_concerns: Below EMA50 and EMA200 — intermediate downtrend
Gareth Soloway warns of 8% further downside if EMA50 not recaptured
fundamentals.summary: SPY is the risk thermometer. Watch the $747 EMA50 level this week for the key directional tell.

risks: EMA50 at $747 — failure to recapture = 8% drawdown scenario per Soloway analysis
Holiday-shortened week = thin liquidity amplifies moves in either direction
Iran-US ceasefire held Sunday but geopolitical flare-up risk remains
